purpose: Figure + table screen for Vöröslakos criterion: cortical slow oscillations / UP-DOWN-compatible slow deflections support LEC/cortex identity.
method_short: Median LFP across good channels, quiet baseline and post-study windows only; Welch spectra plus 0.5-4 Hz slow-deflection counts.
bottom_line: LEC shows a stable quiet-window slow/delta-dominant LFP signature relative to theta, unlike the dHPC comparator. This supports the LEC/cortex functional placement criterion. It is not a formal sleep scoring or laminar UP/DOWN-state analysis.
